---
title: "Untitled"
format: revealjs
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
load('SDI.RData')

# limit to my state 
df <- data_sdi %>%
  filter(region_name == 'CENTRO')
```

# analysis slide


```{r}
# graph dem by region over time

df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(year, SUR_index_sub_exe,
             color = state_name))+
  geom_line()+
  theme_classic()+
  labs(
    color = "State",
    y = 'Democracy Index'
  )


```
